steps.title: Use the second inequality
steps.content:
The second inequality gives a lower bound for $3x$:
$$
3x>13
$$
Subtract $2$ from both sides:
$$
3x-2>11
$$

steps.title: Compare with y
steps.content: The first inequality says $$ y>3x-2 $$ Since $3x-2>11$, any possible $y$-coordinate must satisfy $$ y>11 $$ The answer is B.
